description: lace.config with user_agent = "env:REQUIRED_VAR" (no :default suffix) and REQUIRED_VAR unset in the environment. Per spec §11, this is a startup error: 'resolves to the value of VARNAME, error at startup if unset'. The executor must fail before executing any call. ASSUMPTION: failure surfaces as top-level result outcome "failure" and the call is recorded as skipped / not executed. If the executor chooses to exit non-zero with no result JSON, the runner adapter may need to synthesise a failure result. (spec §11, §15.13)
